username.description: Nutshell account username/email used for HTTP Basic auth.

password.description: Nutshell API token, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Nutshell REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-500) for paginated endpoints.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

account_id.description: Optional account id used by the corresponding detail stream.

activity_id.description: Optional activity id used by the corresponding detail stream.

competitor_map_id.description: Optional competitor map id used by the corresponding detail stream.

competitor_id.description: Optional competitor id used by the corresponding detail stream.

contact_id.description: Optional contact id used by the corresponding detail stream.

edition_id.description: Optional edition id used by the corresponding detail stream.

email_id.description: Optional email id used by the corresponding detail stream.

form_field_id.description: Optional form field id used by the corresponding detail stream.

form_id.description: Optional form id used by the corresponding detail stream.

industry_id.description: Optional industry id used by the corresponding detail stream.

invoice_id.description: Optional invoice id used by the corresponding detail stream.

lead_id.description: Optional lead id used by the corresponding detail stream.

market_id.description: Optional market id used by the corresponding detail stream.

note_id.description: Optional note id used by the corresponding detail stream.

outcome_id.description: Optional outcome id used by the corresponding detail stream.

product_category_id.description: Optional product category id used by the corresponding detail stream.

product_map_id.description: Optional product map id used by the corresponding detail stream.

product_id.description: Optional product id used by the corresponding detail stream.

quote_id.description: Optional quote id used by the corresponding detail stream.

task_id.description: Optional task id used by the corresponding detail stream.

user_id.description: Optional user id used by the corresponding detail stream.
